extraction.one_line_summary: DANESE Alberto won a photo-finish sprint over MILAN Jonathan after a late breakaway collapse, Matthews mixing with pure sprinters from distance
tactical_patterns: Milan questioned why Matthews blocked from breakaway, suggesting teams now rate all-rounders as intermediate sprint threats pre-finale.
GC teams (Ineos) actively positioning leaders through final 3km of flat sprint stage, treating technical finales as crash-risk zones.

rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: launched sprint from far out and still mixed with pure sprinters, suggesting diesel engine exploitable on power finishes
rider_signals.MILAN Jonathan: neutral: lost second photo finish in succession, pattern of strong positioning but marginal defeats raises bike-throw questions
